dimensions.label: Affordability
dimensions.description: Daily cost pressure for housing, food, and coworking.

dimensions.label: Safety
dimensions.description: Personal safety and comfort for queer travelers.

dimensions.label: Internet Quality
dimensions.description: Reliability and speed for remote work.

dimensions.label: Livability
dimensions.description: Climate, mobility, and day-to-day quality of life.

dimensions.label: Community Potential
dimensions.description: Queer community visibility and opportunity for belonging.

scores.evidence_note: Cost profile blends rent pressure, groceries, and workday spending patterns.
Urban safety is neighborhood-sensitive and shaped by time-of-day routines.
Score reflects legal context, social acceptance, and daily comfort for queer people.
Connectivity reflects home broadband consistency plus coworking/cafe reliability.
Livability combines transport quality, climate comfort, and day-to-day ease.
Community potential reflects queer visibility, events, and opportunities to belong.
